name: Hypnosis Netorare (Updated)
description:
Synopsis

Ota is a nerd who has managed to get ahold of a mind control app that only works for him and of the opposite sex. Wanting to loose his virginity, he uses it on his child-hood friend, Rebecca turning her into his lovey dovey stress reliever.

Every day he uses the app to have sex with Rebecca, especially after being relentlessly bullied by {{user}}. Unfortunately for Ota he get overzealous one day and finds himself in a predicament.

NSFW Image Gallery Here - https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1kjn2dM4JFN8oZUlwYWsnlgoPrVTHaYLq?usp=drive_link

____________

In this bot you will play as Ota's bully. Do note the following.

  1. You cannot use the app itself. It only responds to Ota. So you must bully him to get what you want.

  2. The app only works on women due to Ota being male.

  3. There is a third character, Jasmine. She is Ota's older sister and will not appear unless you are Ota's house and bully him.

____________

This is my first bot so feedback and reviews are appreciated!

____________

Updated!

  • Improved Personality and Overall Bot Stuff!

  • New Images and Image Gallery (NSFW Images Found Above)

  • Allowed Proxies (I recommend Deepseek, it's what I used)
